name: Gulf Breeze
flavorHeadline: Roasted tomato, chipotle smoke, serrano, ACV brightness
heatDescriptor: Building on the horizon — smoke, depth, and your first real tingle
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Gulf Breeze EF-2 hot sauce with a burnt orange label
productStory: Gulf Breeze is what happens when the barometer starts dropping but the sky is still beautiful. Chipotle smoke rolls in low and slow, serrano brings the first real tingle, and roasted tomato holds the whole thing together. You can see the storm building on the horizon — and you don't look away.
